title: Navigating Cancer - Patient Navigation Platform
problem: Cancer patients lack coordinated support throughout their care journey, leading to poor outcomes, low satisfaction, and gaps in care.
solution: Patient navigation platform that coordinates care across the cancer journey, manages side effects, and improves patient engagement through digital tools combined with navigation services.
technology: Care coordination platform, patient engagement tools, analytics dashboard
target_customer: Oncology practices, health systems, cancer centers
regulatory_notes: HIPAA compliant, no FDA clearance needed
varden_fit: HIGH - Patient navigation and care coordination are core platform capabilities. Directly applicable to Varden's routing and coordination model.
notes: Human + digital navigation model. Focus on patient experience throughout cancer journey.
